convert-xml-to-pdf-default-xslt.title: Convert XML to PDF with Default XSLT Transformation
convert-xml-to-pdf-default-xslt.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file without a custom XSLT and converting it directly to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-from-xml-string.title: Create PDF from XML String using Aspose.Pdf
create-pdf-from-xml-string.description: Shows how to generate a PDF document with default settings and insert XML content as plain text using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-xml-to-pdf-with-xslt.title: Convert XML to PDF with XSLT Transformation
convert-xml-to-pdf-with-xslt.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, applying an XSLT stylesheet during loading, and saving the result as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-xml-xsd-before-pdf-generation.title: Validate XML with XSD before Generating PDF using Aspose.Pdf
validate-xml-xsd-before-pdf-generation.description: The example validates an XML file against an XSD schema and, if the validation succeeds, converts the XML to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-page-size-from-xml.title: Set PDF Page Size from XML
set-pdf-page-size-from-xml.description: Shows how to read page width and height values from an XML file and apply them to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-page-orientation-from-xml.title: Set PDF Page Orientation from XML Layout
set-pdf-page-orientation-from-xml.description: Demonstrates how to read an orientation attribute from an XML file and apply landscape or portrait layout to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-custom-page-margins-from-xml.title: Set Custom Page Margins from XML in PDF
set-custom-page-margins-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading margin definitions from an XML file and applying them to individual PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf before saving the modified document.

add-automatic-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Automatic Page Numbers to PDF via XSLT
add-automatic-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply XSLT pagination logic, and programmatically insert a page‑number footer on each page using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-pdf-table-from-xml.title: Generate PDF Table from XML Data using Aspose.Pdf
generate-pdf-table-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading XML data, converting it to a DataTable, and creating a PDF report with a table using Aspose.Pdf.

render-xml-cdata-to-pdf.title: Render XML CDATA Sections to PDF
render-xml-cdata-to-pdf.description: The example loads an XML file, extracts all CDATA section contents, and writes each piece as a formatted text fragment into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-custom-font-to-xml-elements-pdf.title: Apply Custom Font to Specific XML Elements in PDF
apply-custom-font-to-xml-elements-pdf.description: Shows how to load an XML file into a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate text fragments containing a target word, and apply a custom TrueType font to improve readability.

embed-custom-ttf-font-into-pdf.title: Embed Custom TrueType Font into PDF from XML
embed-custom-ttf-font-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF, opening a custom TrueType font, marking it for embedding, and applying it to all text fragments before saving the PDF.

generate-pdf-with-external-css.title: Generate PDF from XML with External CSS via XSL
generate-pdf-with-external-css.description: Shows how to load an XML document together with an XSL stylesheet that references external CSS files and convert the result to a styled PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-custom-color-scheme-xml.title: Apply Custom Color Scheme to PDF via XML Styles
apply-custom-color-scheme-xml.description: Shows how to load an XML file that defines style settings, including custom colors, into an Aspose.Pdf Document and save the styled PDF.

apply-page-background-colors-from-xml.title: Apply Custom Page Background Colors from XML
apply-page-background-colors-from-xml.description: Demonstrates how to read hex or named color values from an XML file and set each PDF page's background color accordingly using Aspose.Pdf.

add-header-footer-from-xml.title: Add Header and Footer to PDF Pages from XML Template
add-header-footer-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an XML template that defines header and footer text per page and applying them to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf events.

add-custom-page-borders-xml.title: Add Custom Page Borders to PDF Using XML Definition
add-custom-page-borders-xml.description: Demonstrates how to read border parameters from an XML file and draw a rectangular border on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf graphics objects.

apply-background-images-from-xml.title: Apply Background Images to PDF Pages from XML
apply-background-images-from-xml.description: Shows how to read an XML mapping of page numbers to image files and set those images as background images on the corresponding PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-dynamic-page-headers-from-xml.title: Insert Dynamic Page Headers from XML into PDF
insert-dynamic-page-headers-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading header text from an XML file and applying a different header to each PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-footnotes-into-pdf-pages.title: Insert Footnotes into PDF Pages from XML
insert-footnotes-into-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to read footnote definitions from an XML file and add them as footnote annotations to the corresponding pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-conditional-page-breaks-based-on-.title: Insert Conditional Page Breaks in PDF Based on XML Content Length
insert-conditional-page-breaks-based-on-.description: Shows how to load XML into a PDF, measure the text length on each page, and insert a blank page when the content exceeds a specified character threshold.

create-pdf-toc-from-xml.title: Create PDF Table of Contents from XML Headings
create-pdf-toc-from-xml.description: Shows how to generate a PDF with a Table of Contents by reading heading hierarchy from an XML file and using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content and TOC elements.

create-pdf-bookmarks-from-xml-section-ti.title: Create PDF Bookmarks from XML Section Titles
create-pdf-bookmarks-from-xml-section-ti.description: Loads an XML file with section titles, generates a PDF page for each section, and adds outline (bookmark) entries that navigate to the corresponding pages.

create-pdf-outline-from-xml.title: Create PDF Outline Hierarchy from XML Nesting
create-pdf-outline-from-xml.description: Shows how to load an XML file, bind it to a PDF, and generate a multi‑level outline that mirrors the XML element hierarchy for easy navigation.

apply-page-transitions-to-pdf.title: Apply Page Transition Effects to PDF from XML
apply-page-transitions-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an XML file into a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, apply a fade transition to every page using PdfPageEditor, and set the display duration for presentation mode.

set-pdf-page-duration-from-xml.title: Set PDF Page Transition Duration from XML
set-pdf-page-duration-from-xml.description: Shows how to read page‑specific duration values from an XML file and apply them to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then save the updated document.

generate-pdf-from-xml-fullscreen.title: Generate PDF from XML with Full‑Screen Viewer Mode
generate-pdf-from-xml-fullscreen.description: Demonstrates how to convert an XML file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, enable full‑screen viewer mode, and define the behavior after exiting full‑screen.

set-pdf-viewer-preferences-from-xml.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences from XML
set-pdf-viewer-preferences-from-xml.description: Demonstrates how to load an XML file into an Aspose.Pdf Document and configure viewer preferences such as fit‑window, center window, and page mode before saving the PDF.

generate-pdf-1-7-from-xml.title: Generate PDF Version 1.7 from XML
generate-pdf-1-7-from-xml.description: Shows how to load an XML file with Aspose.Pdf, convert it to PDF version 1.7 while creating a conversion log, and save the resulting PDF.

encrypt-xml-to-pdf-restrict-permissions.title: Encrypt XML‑to‑PDF with Restricted Permissions
encrypt-xml-to-pdf-restrict-permissions.description: Loads an XML file, converts it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then encrypts the PDF with user and owner passwords while disabling printing and copying by setting permissions to none.

encrypt-pdf-from-xml-with-password.title: Encrypt PDF from XML with Password Protection
encrypt-pdf-from-xml-with-password.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, converting it to a PDF, and applying password‑based AES‑256 encryption with specific permissions using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-from-xml-and-digital-signatur.title: Create PDF from XML and Apply Digital Signature
create-pdf-from-xml-and-digital-signatur.description: Demonstrates generating a PDF that contains XML content as plain text and digitally signing it using a PFX certificate.

encrypt-pdf-from-xml-drm.title: Encrypt PDF Generated from XML with DRM
encrypt-pdf-from-xml-drm.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, converting it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, applying AES‑256 encryption with specific permissions, and saving the protected document.

compress-pdf-streams-from-xml.title: Compress PDF Streams from XML
compress-pdf-streams-from-xml.description: Shows how to bind an XML file to a PDF document, enable object compression using OptimizationOptions, and save the resulting smaller PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

compress-pdf-xml-flate-compression.title: Compress PDF via XML Conversion and Flate Compression
compress-pdf-xml-flate-compression.description: Demonstrates how to reduce a PDF file size by exporting it to XML, re‑importing it, and applying Flate compression to object streams using Aspose.Pdf optimization features.

compress-pdf-objects-from-xml.title: Compress PDF Objects Generated from XML
compress-pdf-objects-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading XML into a PDF with XmlLoadOptions and applying resource optimization to compress PDF objects, reducing the file size.

downsample-images-xml-to-pdf.title: Downsample Images in PDF Generated from XML
downsample-images-xml-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF document, configuring optimization options to downsample large images and compress resources, and saving the optimized PDF.

set-image-resolution-when-exporting-pdf-.title: Export PDF to HTML with Specified Image Resolution
set-image-resolution-when-exporting-pdf-.description: Shows how to load an XML file into a PDF document and export it to HTML while setting the DPI of the generated page images.

convert-base64-images-xml-to-pdf.title: Convert Base64 Images from XML to PDF
convert-base64-images-xml-to-pdf.description: Loads an XML file, decodes base64‑encoded images, and embeds each image on a separate PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

render-svg-from-xml-to-pdf.title: Render SVG Elements from XML into PDF as Vector Graphics
render-svg-from-xml-to-pdf.description: Shows how to extract <svg> markup from an XML file, convert each SVG to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf, and combine the pages into a single PDF document.

render-html-cdata-to-pdf.title: Render HTML CDATA Sections as PDF Pages
render-html-cdata-to-pdf.description: Loads an XML file, extracts HTML fragments stored in CDATA sections, and converts each fragment into a separate page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-barcodes-from-xml-to-pdf.title: Create Barcodes in PDF from XML Template
create-barcodes-from-xml-to-pdf.description: Loads a PDF layout from an XML file, reads barcode definitions from the same XML, generates Code128 barcodes and places them on the specified pages, then saves the resulting PDF.

embed-video-annotations-from-xml.title: Embed Video Annotations from XML into PDF
embed-video-annotations-from-xml.description: Demonstrates how to read video file references from an XML document and embed them as RichMedia video annotations on specific PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-audio-annotations-from-xml.title: Embed Audio Annotations from XML into PDF
embed-audio-annotations-from-xml.description: Loads an XML file that lists audio files and their positions, creates SoundAnnotation objects for each entry, and embeds them into the specified pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-3d-models-from-xml-into-pdf.title: Embed 3D Models from XML into PDF as Interactive Annotations
embed-3d-models-from-xml-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XML list of 3D model files and embedding each as a PDF3D annotation on specified pages of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-javascript-in-pdf-from-xml.title: Embed JavaScript in PDF from XML with a Validation Button
embed-javascript-in-pdf-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF, adding a document‑open JavaScript action, and creating a button field with a mouse‑release JavaScript for form validation.

create-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.title: Create PDF Form Fields from XML and Set Default Values
create-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an XFA definition from an XML file, assigning it to a PDF document, and populating each form field with a default value.

populate-pdf-form-from-xml.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from XML Using Aspose.Pdf
populate-pdf-form-from-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF template and an XML data file, assign the XML to the PDF's XFA form to fill form fields, and save the resulting populated PDF.

extract-plain-text-from-pdf.title: Extract Plain Text from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
extract-plain-text-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, configure a TextAbsorber for pure text extraction, retrieve text from all pages, and write the result to a .txt file.

export-pdf-pages-to-bmp-from-xml.title: Export PDF Pages as BMP Images from XML
export-pdf-pages-to-bmp-from-xml.description: Loads an XML file, generates a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's BindXml API, and saves each PDF page as a separate BMP image with a specified resolution.

convert-pdf-pages-to-png-thumbnails.title: Convert PDF Pages to High-Resolution PNG Thumbnails
convert-pdf-pages-to-png-thumbnails.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set a high DPI resolution, and render each page as a PNG image for thumbnail creation.

create-thumbnail-from-xml-pdf.title: Create Thumbnail from First Page of XML‑Generated PDF
create-thumbnail-from-xml-pdf.description: The example loads an XML file, converts it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and generates a PNG thumbnail of the first PDF page.

batch-convert-xml-to-pdf.title: Batch Convert XML Files to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
batch-convert-xml-to-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate over a folder of XML files, load each into an Aspose.Pdf Document using BindXml, and save them as separate PDF files.

convert-xml-to-pdf-merge.title: Convert XML Files to PDFs and Merge into a Single Document
convert-xml-to-pdf-merge.description: The example converts each XML file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's XML loading options, then merges all generated PDFs into one combined PDF file.

split-pdf-into-chapters-by-keyword.title: Split PDF into Chapters Using a Keyword
split-pdf-into-chapters-by-keyword.description: The example loads an XML file as a PDF, detects pages that contain a chapter marker, and splits the PDF into separate chapter files.

paginate-xml-to-multiple-pdfs-bates-numb.title: Paginate Large XML to Multiple PDFs with Bates Numbering
paginate-xml-to-multiple-pdfs-bates-numb.description: The example loads a large XML file, converts it to a PDF, splits the document into multiple PDF files each containing a fixed number of pages, and adds sequential Bates numbers to each page.

repeat-table-header-rows.title: Repeat Table Header Rows on Each PDF Page
repeat-table-header-rows.description: Demonstrates how to define header rows in an Aspose.Pdf table and configure them to repeat automatically on every new page when the table spans multiple pages.

validate-pdfa-2b-compliance-xml-to-pdf.title: Validate PDF/A-2b Compliance After Converting XML to PDF
validate-pdfa-2b-compliance-xml-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an XML file into an Aspose.Pdf Document, convert it to PDF/A‑2b, validate the compliance, and save the resulting PDF.

extract-pdf-xml-representation.title: Extract PDF XML Representation
extract-pdf-xml-representation.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf and export its internal XML representation to an external file.

convert-pdf-to-html-preview.title: Convert PDF to HTML for Web Preview
convert-pdf-to-html-preview.description: Loads a PDF generated from XML and saves it as an HTML file using Aspose.Pdf, embedding raster images as PNG inside SVG.

convert-xml-to-pdf.title: Convert XML Files to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
convert-xml-to-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate over XML files in a directory, bind each XML to an Aspose.Pdf Document, and save it as a PDF while logging each step and handling errors.

handle-malformed-xml-xml-to-pdf.title: Handle Malformed XML During XML‑to‑PDF Conversion
handle-malformed-xml-xml-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to abort an XML‑to‑PDF conversion when the source XML is malformed by using a custom warning handler and exception handling with Aspose.Pdf.

convert-xslfo-to-pdf-with-custom-warning.title: Convert XSL‑FO to PDF with Custom Warning Handler
convert-xslfo-to-pdf-with-custom-warning.description: Demonstrates loading an XSL‑FO document using Aspose.Pdf with a custom warning handler to gracefully handle parsing errors, then generating a PDF with user‑friendly messages.

thread-safe-pdf-generation-from-xml.title: Thread‑Safe PDF Generation from XML Files in Parallel
thread-safe-pdf-generation-from-xml.description: Demonstrates how to convert multiple XML files to PDF concurrently using Aspose.Pdf with thread‑safe handling via Parallel.ForEach and proper disposal of Document objects.

register-pdf-output-generator-service.title: Register PDF Output Generator Service
register-pdf-output-generator-service.description: Demonstrates how to register Aspose.Pdf's PdfOutputGenerator as a singleton in the .NET dependency injection container for reuse throughout an application.

batch-xml-to-pdf-conversion-performance.title: Batch XML to PDF Conversion with Performance Metrics
batch-xml-to-pdf-conversion-performance.description: Loads each XML file using Aspose.Pdf's XmlLoadOptions, converts it to a PDF, saves the output, and records execution time and memory usage to profile the batch conversion performance.

retry-pdf-generation-with-transient-io-h.title: Retry PDF Generation with Transient I/O Error Handling
retry-pdf-generation-with-transient-io-h.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, adding a page, and saving it while applying exponential back‑off retry logic for transient I/O and Aspose.Pdf errors.

generate-pdf-from-xsl-fo-or-xml-config.title: Generate PDF from XSL-FO or XML via Config File
generate-pdf-from-xsl-fo-or-xml-config.description: Shows how to read XSL‑FO or XML (with optional XSLT) file paths from a JSON configuration and create a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

transform-xml-multiple-namespaces-to-pdf.title: Transform XML with Multiple Namespaces to PDF using XSLT
transform-xml-multiple-namespaces-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with an XSLT stylesheet that defines distinct namespace prefixes, applying the transformation during PDF creation, and saving the result. Shows how Aspose.Pdf resolves namespace conflicts automatically.

generate-pdf-from-xml-with-page-size-ove.title: Generate PDF from XML with Page Size Override
generate-pdf-from-xml-with-page-size-ove.description: Shows how to load an XML (optionally with an XSL stylesheet) into an Aspose.Pdf Document, enforce a uniform page size for all pages, and save the result as a PDF.

convert-xml-to-pdf-using-xsl-fo.title: Convert XML to PDF using XSL‑FO with Aspose.Pdf
convert-xml-to-pdf-using-xsl-fo.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, applying an XSL‑FO stylesheet, and saving the resulting PDF using Aspose.Pdf's XmlLoadOptions and Document classes.

apply-different-page-margins.title: Apply Different Page Margins to PDF Sections
apply-different-page-margins.description: Demonstrates how to set distinct margin sets for specific page ranges in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's MarginInfo and PageInfo objects.

encrypt-pdf-from-xml-with-custom-securit.title: Encrypt PDF from XML with Custom Security Handler
encrypt-pdf-from-xml-with-custom-securit.description: Shows how to load an XML file into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and apply a custom encryption handler to protect the PDF with user and owner passwords.
